# Process Mapper - Copilot Instructions

- React + TypeScript app for business process mapping (flowcharts/workflows)
- Uses Vite as build tool
- Uses @xyflow/react (React Flow) for diagram canvas
- Node types: Start, End, Process, Decision
- Features: drag-and-drop palette, node connections, canvas toolbar
